title: Amenity Request Handling Playbook for Hotels in Egypt
trigger: A guest requests an amenity through the front desk, concierge, or digital platform.

steps.title: Receive and Acknowledge Request
steps.action: Upon receiving a request for an amenity, acknowledge the guest's request immediately. Confirm the details of the request including the type of amenity, room number, and any special instructions.

steps.title: Verify Amenity Availability
steps.action: Check the availability of the requested amenity in the inventory system. If the amenity is available, proceed to the next step. If not, inform the guest and offer alternatives.

steps.title: Prepare and Deliver Amenity
steps.action: Coordinate with housekeeping or relevant department to prepare the amenity. Ensure that the amenity is delivered to the guest's room promptly and confirm delivery with the guest.

steps.title: Communicate Alternatives
steps.action: If the requested amenity is unavailable, communicate this to the guest and offer suitable alternatives. Ensure guest satisfaction by providing a complimentary service if necessary.

steps.title: Follow-Up and Feedback
steps.action: After the amenity is delivered or an alternative is provided, follow up with the guest to ensure satisfaction. Record feedback in the PMS for future reference.

description: This playbook outlines the steps for handling guest amenity requests in hotels, ensuring a seamless and satisfactory experience for guests in Egypt.
escalation_path: If the guest is dissatisfied at any point, escalate the issue to the Duty Manager for immediate resolution.
